name: the GCTP handoff names govern-before-write and both-paths pre-write enforcement
command: grep -q '§28.60 govern-before-write' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && grep -q '§28.68 both-paths pre-write' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && grep -q 'enforce-standards-pre-write.sh' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && echo handoff-prewrite 1>&2
